llm_response: Dear Sarah, I hope this email finds you well and that you are having a wonderful week. We are planning a special dinner next Monday at 7, and it would be wonderful if you could join us. This meal is particularly meaningful because it marks a significant milestone in our relationship, making it a time to truly celebrate together. As the saying goes, "食不言，寝不语" (eat without speaking, sleep without talking), we aim to enjoy our conversation and each other's company without distractions.
